# StyleSwift project exploration (2026-03-16 13:07Z)

_**User**_

Please explore the StyleSwift browser extension project at d:\PRODUCT\PRODUCT\StyleSwift. I need to understand:
1. The overall project structure
2. What icons are currently being used in the UI (look for icon references in HTML, CSS, JS files)
3. What the brand style/design system looks like (colors, fonts, style)
4. The content of these key files:
   - d:\PRODUCT\PRODUCT\StyleSwift\extension\sidepanel\index.html
   - d:\PRODUCT\PRODUCT\StyleSwift\extension\sidepanel\panel.css (first 200 lines to get design tokens)
   - d:\PRODUCT\PRODUCT\StyleSwift\extension\sidepanel\panel.js (search for icon usage)

Please return:
- A summary of the project structure
- All icon usages found (SVG inline, CSS background images, font icons, emoji icons, img tags, etc.)
- The brand colors and design style
- Any existing icon library being used
